description: ANALYST re-proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 pending AUDITOR decision. Ledger shows two consecutive TASK_PROPOSED events (TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001-PROPOSED-0001, TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001-PROPOSED-0002) without intervening PRE_ACTION_APPROVED or VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED from AUDITOR. CLOUD_CODE execution is confirmed complete at commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9, producing governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json with pass status across all five autonomous loop integrity checks: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter present at commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5; (2) auditor-runner.yml server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED at commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae; (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing at commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26; (4) governance/ledger/ contains ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. ANALYST asserts all evidence is present on main branch and requests AUDITOR to issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED based on independent inspection of governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files. Upon AUDITOR VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED, TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 is CLOSED and the system advances to the next roadmap phase. No further ANALYST action is possible until AUDITOR issues a decision event.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch at commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9 with pass status for all five validation checks; .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml containing dispatch role filter and PRE_ACTION_APPROVED-gated current_task.json write; .github/workflows/analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing; governance/ledger/ ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162
